creator: kes-kes@yandex.ru
text:
Hi

I think you must use
ifconfig bge0 add aaa.bbb.ccc.ddd/24
ifconfig bge0 add aaa.bbb.ccc.eee/32

instead of:
ifconfig bge0 inet aaa.bbb.ccc.ddd/24
ifconfig bge0 inet aaa.bbb.ccc.eee/32 alias

in your case you change configuration, not add alias

--
